'''chachozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pocosen|pocosen]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ch-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pocosen|pocosen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chachozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæchezheth|chæchezheth]] || [[word:chæchezhej|chæchezhej]] || [[word:chæchezhesh|chæchezhesh]] || [[word:chæchezhe|chæchezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chachochozhoth|chachochozhoth]] || [[word:chachochozhoj|chachochozhoj]] || [[word:chachochozhosh|chachochozhosh]] || [[word:chachochozho|chachochozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chachozhoth|chachozhoth]] || [[word:chachozhoj|chachozhoj]] || [[word:chachozhosh|chachozhosh]] || [[word:chachozho|chachozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chachofzhoth|chachofzhoth]] || [[word:chachofzhoj|chachofzhoj]] || [[word:chachofzhosh|chachofzhosh]] || [[word:chachofzhof|chachofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chachozhotho|chachozhotho]] || [[word:chachozhojo|chachozhojo]] || [[word:chachozhosho|chachozhosho]] || [[word:chachozhoko|chachozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chachozhoth|chachozhoth]] || [[word:chachozhoj|chachozhoj]] || [[word:chachozhosh|chachozhosh]] || [[word:chachozho|chachozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chachozhothol|chachozhothol]] || [[word:chachozhojol|chachozhojol]] || [[word:chachozhoshol|chachozhoshol]] || [[word:chachozhokol|chachozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chachozhothotho|chachozhothotho]] || [[word:chachozhojojo|chachozhojojo]] || [[word:chachozhoshosho|chachozhoshosho]] || [[word:chachozhoko|chachozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chachozhothon|chachozhothon]] || [[word:chachozhojon|chachozhojon]] || [[word:chachozhoshon|chachozhoshon]] || [[word:chachozhokon|chachozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chachozhothoro|chachozhothoro]] || [[word:chachozhojoro|chachozhojoro]] || [[word:chachozhoshoro|chachozhoshoro]] || [[word:chachozhokoro|chachozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
